mapper.insert: INSERT INTO college (name, code, description, phone, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{phone}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, description, phone, create_time, update_time FROM college
SELECT id, name, code, description, phone, create_time, update_time FROM college WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, code, description, phone, create_time, update_time FROM college WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.code, c.description, c.phone, c.create_time, c.update_time, t.id AS deanId, t.name AS deanName, t.phone AS deanPhone FROM college c LEFT JOIN college_teacher ct ON c.id = ct.college_id AND ct.is_dean = 1 LEFT JOIN teacher t ON ct.teacher_id = t.id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND c.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
ORDER BY c.id ASC
SELECT id, name, code, description, phone, create_time, update_time FROM college WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_room WHERE college_id = #{collegeId}

SELECT col.id AS collegeId, col.name AS collegeName, col.code AS collegeCode, col.description, col.phone, col.create_time, COUNT(DISTINCT cr.id) AS classCount, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS studentCount FROM college col LEFT JOIN class_room cr ON cr.college_id = col.id LEFT JOIN student s ON s.class_id = cr.id WHERE col.id = #{collegeId} GROUP BY col.id, col.name, col.code, col.description, col.phone, col.create_time
